notes.unstable_apis: API-NOTIF-004/005 are UNSTABLE pending DRV-NOTIF-003 (missing read/unread DB column) — implement per execution-plan.md's documented Escalation Note when reached in SVCAPI; do not silently omit.
notes.svcapi_layer1_progress: 2026-07-13 — SVCAPI is XL, chunked into 4 layers (per execute-notification.md STEP 0 assessment): Layer 1 (shared NotificationEventProcessor + API-NOTIF-001 Send + API-NOTIF-002 Schedule) is DONE and compiles clean (full reactor BUILD SUCCESS). current_phase/current_sub deliberately left at SVCAPI/PENDING — Layers 2 (History/Unread/Read), 3 (Template CRUD), 4 (Channel Config) are still PENDING within the same sub. Do not treat SVCAPI as stale/skipped; it's mid-flight across sessions, same convention as PLAN-SEC-002's per-phase handoffs.
notes.drv_notif_002_application: Layer 1's NotificationEventProcessor.resolveTemplate() implements RULE-NOTIF-006's 'missing template falls back rather than fails' requirement by probing a SYSTEM_DEFAULT templateCode (not seeded anywhere) and, failing that, using a fully in-memory generic NotificationTemplate (not persisted). No governed artifact defines what the actual default template should contain — this is the concrete resolution of DRV-NOTIF-002 for this session; revisit if a real default template is ever seeded.
notes.drv_notif_004_schedule_gap: NEW — API-NOTIF-002's NotificationScheduleRequest.scheduledAt has no backing column in DBS-NOTIF-001 (NOTIF_LOG's DBF-0001..0016 catalog has none). Per Section 2A.3 (no column invented), Layer 1 implements /schedule as an immediate dispatch identical to /send rather than a fabricated in-memory-only timer that would lose scheduled sends on restart. Same GOVERNANCE-NOTE-BLOCKED posture as DRV-NOTIF-003 for API-NOTIF-004/005. Needs an SRS/DB amendment (a scheduled-dispatch timestamp column) before real deferred scheduling can be built.
notes.svcapi_request_dto_gap: SVCAPI.md's literal NotificationSendRequest field list (recipientId, channelHint, templateCode, contextData, priority) omits moduleCode despite NOTIF_LOG.MODULE_CODE being NOT NULL (DBF-0010) with no other source for it in this codebase (no service-to-service caller-identity credential exists). Layer 1 added moduleCode (required) plus referenceId/referenceType (optional, nullable columns) to NotificationSendRequest/NotificationScheduleRequest to make the contract satisfiable. priority is accepted+validated (HIGH/MEDIUM/LOW) but not persisted anywhere — NOTIF_LOG has no matching column either.
notes.svcapi_layer2_progress: 2026-07-13 — Layer 2 (History/Unread/Read, API-NOTIF-003/004/005) is DONE and compiles clean (full reactor BUILD SUCCESS, including erp-security which gained new SecurityPermissions.NOTIFICATION_* constants — purely additive, matching already-seeded dbs-notif-001.md permission names). current_phase/current_sub still deliberately at SVCAPI/PENDING — Layers 3 (Template CRUD) and 4 (Channel Config) remain.
notes.svcapi_no_current_user_id_accessor: Real gap found: erp-common-utils' SecurityContextHelper only exposes the authenticated username (String) — there is no numeric-user-id accessor anywhere (the JWT principal is a plain org.springframework.security.core.userdetails.User, not a custom principal carrying USERS_PK). API-NOTIF-003's 'recipientId defaults to caller's own id' therefore required a NEW cross-module client (SecurityUserClient) that resolves username -> id via POST /api/users/search (username EQUALS filter) — erp-security has no dedicated '/me' or by-username lookup endpoint either. Recommend a common-utils/erp-security fix (embed userId in the JWT principal) so future modules don't need this same per-module workaround.
notes.svcapi_history_recipient_admin_gap: API-NOTIF-003's SVCAPI.md text says recipientId query should be admin-gated ('Admin may query others per permission') but dbs-notif-001.md only seeds PERM_NOTIFICATION_INBOX_VIEW/CREATE/UPDATE/DELETE for SCR-NOTIF-001 — no distinct admin-tier permission exists to gate cross-recipient queries. Implemented as: any caller holding PERM_NOTIFICATION_INBOX_VIEW may pass an explicit recipientId (not restricted to self). Flagged, not silently decided — revisit if/when a dedicated admin-scope permission is seeded.
notes.svcapi_history_search_method_fix: SVCAPI.md literally specifies 'GET /api/v1/notifications/history' for API-NOTIF-003, but NotificationHistorySearchRequest extends BaseSearchContractRequest (filters/sorts/page/size body) — this platform's own enforce-backend-contract A.6.6 rule (automatic rejection trigger) mandates POST + @RequestBody for any BaseSearchContractRequest-shaped search, never GET. Implemented as POST /api/v1/notifications/history/search instead — a contract-authoring inconsistency in SVCAPI.md, not a deviation from platform governance. API-NOTIF-004 (GET /unread, no body) was kept as GET — it isn't a search endpoint.
notes.svcapi_layer3_progress: 2026-07-13 — Layer 3 (Template CRUD, API-NOTIF-006..010) is DONE and compiles clean (full reactor BUILD SUCCESS). current_phase/current_sub still deliberately at SVCAPI/PENDING — only Layer 4 (Channel Config, API-NOTIF-011/012) remains for this sub.
notes.svcapi_template_search_method_fix: Same A.6.6 fix as svcapi_history_search_method_fix: SVCAPI.md's API-NOTIF-006 literally says 'GET /api/v1/notifications/templates', but NotificationTemplateSearchRequest extends BaseSearchContractRequest — implemented as POST /api/v1/notifications/templates/search instead. GET /templates/{id} (API-NOTIF-010, no body) was kept as GET.
notes.svcapi_template_bilingual_errcode: RULE-NOTIF-006's bilingual-completeness check (ERR-NOTIF-0002) is enforced explicitly in NotificationTemplateService (assertBilingual), not via @NotBlank on templateBodyAr/En in the Create/UpdateRequest DTOs — a bean-validation annotation would surface the generic framework VALIDATION_ERROR/400 instead of the plan's own ERR-NOTIF-0002 code. Same precedent as erp-file's FILE_NAME_REQUIRED (also an explicit service-layer check, not a DTO annotation, for the same reason).

Created frontend/src/app/modules/notification/notification-inbox/models/notification-log.model.ts (NotificationLogDto, ContractFilter/ContractSort local pair matching security/user-profiles' precedent, NotificationHistorySearchRequest per api-docs searchHistory.md, and NotificationHistoryFilter — the UI-facing filter panel type F2.md's facade spec already references by name). `npx tsc --noEmit` clean. Created services/notification-inbox-api.service.ts (searchHistory, plus getUnread/markAsRead as typed contract shells for API-NOTIF-004/005 — not silently omitted per execute-notification.md's constraint, but NOT called from the facade) and facades/notification-inbox.facade.ts (notifications/totalElements/loading/error/filter/currentPage/pageSize + LOV state, matching F2.md's facade spec exactly: Init loads LOV-NOTIF-001/002 and calls API-NOTIF-003, bell/unread-count init step deliberately excluded per DRV-NOTIF-003). No facade in the entire modules/ tree previously injected LookupService — this is the first — so there's no existing precedent for the lang-aware LOV-in-facade pattern used here (TranslateService.currentLang read directly in the facade, matching the one existing LookupService consumer's pattern in finance/gl/accounts-tree.component.ts, just moved into a facade). current_phase/current_sub still deliberately at F2/PENDING — Sessions 2 (SCR-NOTIF-002 Template Management) and 3 (SCR-NOTIF-003 Channel Configuration) remain.
notes.f2_session2_progress: 2026-07-15 — F2 Session 2/3 done: create-api-service + create-facade applied to SCR-NOTIF-002. Created services/notification-template-api.service.ts (search/getById/create/update/deactivate — API-NOTIF-006..010) and facades/notification-template.facade.ts (templates/totalElements/loading/error/saving/saveError/currentTemplate/currentPage/pageSize + channelOptions LOV state via the same LookupService fix as Session 1). `npx tsc --noEmit` clean. Design choice: kept separate create()/update() methods rather than F2.md's literal 'save()→API-NOTIF-007/008' single-method phrasing — every existing facade in this codebase (UserProfileFacade, PagesFacade, MasterLookupFacade example) uses separate create/update methods with the choice made at the component/caller level, so this follows established precedent rather than inventing a new merged-method pattern; functionally equivalent, no behavior lost. Also: NotificationTemplateSearchFilter needs no ContractFilter[] conversion (unlike NotificationInboxFacade) — api-docs' NotificationTemplateSearchRequest already exposes templateCode/channelTypeId/moduleCode/isActiveFl as direct named optional properties, not generic filters[] entries, so the facade's search filter maps 1:1 onto the wire request. current_phase/current_sub still deliberately at F2/PENDING — Session 3 (SCR-NOTIF-003 Channel Configuration) remains.

notes.f3_complete: 2026-07-15 — Phase F3 is COMPLETE (single sub, no per-screen chunking needed — Weight Map's XL/'~7 RULE-IDs' estimate did not match reality: F3.md only defines 2 RULE-IDs, RULE-NOTIF-006 bilingual-required and RULE-NOTIF-007 templateCode uniqueness/immutability, plus one cross-screen F3-SEC-RULE-1 permission-field-behavior note). This makes F3 a specification-verification phase, same category as DOC/INTC/INTR, not a code-writing phase — there is no reactive form yet to wire Validators.required or disabled-on-edit logic into. notes.f4_complete: 2026-07-15/16 — Phase F4 is COMPLETE, all 3 screens built in one session (chunked internally like F1/F2, no separate state entries). Because NOTIFICATION has no F1-built component shells (unlike SECURITY's pre-AMEND-P3-J F1, which built empty erp-empty-state placeholders — see f3_complete/governance_amend_p3_j_f4_phase memory), F4 was the first phase to write real Angular components for this module: NotificationHistoryComponent (SCR-NOTIF-001, AG Grid + LOV filter panel, read-only, no actions column since mark-as-read is GOVERNANCE-NOTE-BLOCKED), NotificationBellComponent (shared/components, replaces the CodedThemes demo notification dropdown stub previously hardcoded in nav-right.component.html/ts — the fake `notifications` array and its static badge dot were removed), NotificationTemplateSearchComponent+EntryComponent (SCR-NOTIF-002, PATTERN-1 AG Grid + reactive form, edit+deactivate actions), and NotificationChannelConfigComponent (SCR-NOTIF-003, plain Bootstrap table since only 5 fixed rows — no AG Grid needed). Path corrections (same class of fix as f1_session1_progress's flagged F4-SCR-NOTIF-00{1,2,3}.md path mismatch): every F4 sub file said module/component paths live under `app/features/notifications/...`, but that directory doesn't exist anywhere in this codebase — verified against security-routing.module.ts/master-data-routing.module.ts's real convention (`app/modules/<domain>/<feature>/pages/<component>/`) and used that instead; NotificationBellComponent's stated `app/shared/components/notification-bell/` path was already correct (matches file-attachment's precedent). Routing structural decision: NotificationModule is mounted in app-routing.module.ts at `path: ''` (not `path: 'notification'` like security/master-data's prefixed pattern) because F4-RULE-1's routes are absolute top-level paths (/notifications, /notification-templates, /notification-channel-configs) with no shared prefix segment — confirmed by re-reading all 3 F4-SCR-NOTIF-*.md route specs before writing app-routing.module.ts. RULE-NOTIF-006/007 (F3.md) wired as real Angular validators: a `bilingualRequiredValidator` custom function (mirrors RULE-SEC-034's `requiredActiveBranchValidator` precedent) applied to templateBodyAr/En, mapped through form-error-resolver.ts's `bilingualRequiredNotif006` error key to the catalog-exact ERR-NOTIF-0002 text (not generic VALIDATION.REQUIRED); templateCode uses plain Validators.required + is form.disable()'d entirely once in EDIT/VIEW mode (RULE-NOTIF-007 immutability) with server-side 409 duplicate-check surfaced via two new erp-error-mapper.service.ts entries (NOTIF_TEMPLATE_BILINGUAL_REQUIRED, NOTIF_TEMPLATE_CODE_DUPLICATE) added this session — optional client-side ON_BLUR pre-check (F3.md marks it optional, server is authoritative) was skipped, consistent with this session's 'never invent/never over-build beyond what's specified' precedent. F3-SEC-RULE-1 (permission-gated field/button visibility) deliberately NOT wired yet — erpPermission is only applied to actions/buttons that already had an established precedent (create/edit/deactivate/toggle/save), not to blanket-disable whole forms on canEdit=false; that's explicitly SEC phase's job next (permission matrix), matching SECURITY's own F1/F2-then-SEC precedent. Also added: NOTIFICATIONS/NOTIFICATION_TEMPLATES/NOTIFICATION_CHANNEL_CONFIGS i18n sections to both en.json/ar.json (Arabic text for the two new error keys copied verbatim from f3_complete's already-verified backend messages_ar.properties strings). Verified via `npx tsc --noEmit` (clean) AND a full `ng build --configuration=production` (clean — all 3 screens' lazy chunks present: notification-inbox/notification-templates/notification-channel-config, zero new errors, one self-introduced unused-import warning on NotificationBellComponent found and fixed, only the 2 pre-existing unrelated warnings remain). Same Playwright/Chromium environment limitation as F1/F2/F3 (see plan_sec_002_phase3_state memory) — no browser-based visual click-through was possible; a manual verification pass is recommended before trusting this phase as fully proven, especially the bell's live wiring into the global header (touches every page) and the channel-config inline-save flow. PLAYWRIGHT test_phase's gated_by_phases (F1/F2/F3/F4) are now ALL COMPLETE — unblocked and eligible to run any time, same flagging pattern as intr_complete did for JUNIT. current_phase/current_sub advanced to SEC (Permission matrix — @PreAuthorize/service-layer checks, JWT-driven UI gating, and finally F3-SEC-RULE-1's canEdit/canCreate field-and-button visibility) per the Exit step in execute-notification.md.
